ariaSpec.usage: Specifies the role of the ListBox list element.
Adds a label to the list element of the ListBox.
Specifies the role of the ListBox item element.
Set to true if the item is selected.
The focused listbox item should have tabindex 0, all others -1.
The toolbar is a collection of command buttons.
Clarifies the purpose of the toolbar.
Points to the id of the listbox element being controlled.
All buttons in the toolbar must have labels.

kbSpec.behavior: Focuses the ListBox toolbar (the last focused or the first button in it).
Adds the previous item to the selected items.
Adds the next item to the selected items.

kbSpec.shortcut: Ctrl (or Cmd on Mac) + Up Arrow
kbSpec.behavior: Moves the focus to the previous item.

kbSpec.shortcut: Ctrl (or Cmd on Mac) + Down Arrow
kbSpec.behavior: Moves the focus to the next item.

kbSpec.shortcut: Ctrl (or Cmd on Mac) + Right Arrow
kbSpec.behavior: Adds the selected items to the connected ListBox.

kbSpec.shortcut: Ctrl (or Cmd on Mac) + Left Arrow
kbSpec.behavior: Adds the selected items from the connected ListBox to the current one.

kbSpec.shortcut: Ctrl (or Cmd on Mac) + Shift + Up Arrow
Ctrl (or Cmd on Mac) + Shift + Down Arrow
Ctrl (or Cmd on Mac) + Shift + Right Arrow
kbSpec.behavior: Transfers all items to the connected ListBox.

kbSpec.shortcut: Ctrl (or Cmd on Mac) + Shift + Left Arrow
kbSpec.behavior: Transfers all items from the connected ListBox.
Focuses the next button in the toolbar.
Focuses the previous button in the toolbar.
Executes the currenly focused button command if enabled.
